## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between fwd.digital and Multiplier for content strategy and SEO growth.](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiplier aims to capture 30% of 30,000 monthly commercial intent searches in their ecosystem by Q2](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content generation with human expertise, managing 30 clients across 7 pods](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Multiplier wants to focus on global employment content, not general HR, with a country-specific strategy](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [fwd.digital can potentially start work by February 10th, aligning with Multiplier's February 6th target](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Topics

### Multiplier's Background and Goals

  - [Chirayu leads revenue marketing at Multiplier, an employer of record platform](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Aim: Double down on organic growth in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Current focus: Educating market on global hiring benefits](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Created programmatic content pieces and country guides on their website](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Goal: Capture 30% of 30,000 monthly commercial intent searches by Q2](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### fwd.digital's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Marcel's extensive content marketing background (IBM, HP, startups)](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [AI-powered content generation with human expertise oversight](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [7 pods managing 30 clients, each pod has 5-6 people](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Custom research agents and workflows adapted to each company](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Can handle high volume (e.g., potential 30,000 pages/year for HIMS)](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Combines AI generation with editor guidance and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)

### Content Strategy for Multiplier

  - [Focus on global employment authority, not general HR](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Country-specific strategy crucial (97 potential country targets)](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Match job type intent with country-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Cover compliance, compensation, and procedures](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Potential for a few thousand pages of targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Opportunity to differentiate from competitors' approaches](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### SEO Landscape and Opportunities

  - [Multiplier currently ranks well for some key terms (e.g., "employer of record")](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Competitors like Remote have significantly more pages (11,000 vs Multiplier's 1,500)](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Opportunity to create authoritative content on global employment specifics](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Multiplier aims to finalize vendor by February 6th](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [fwd.digital can potentially start work by February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Marcel to send a sample SLW and add Chirayu to a Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled, possibly as soon as Friday](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send sample SLW and Slack channel invite to Chirayu](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Chirayu to send calendar link for scheduling follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting as soon as Friday to finalize details](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [fwd.digital to prepare for potential February 10th project start](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Multiplier to make final vendor decision by February 6th](https://fathom.video/share/BKeosxT5-4H-Lcz1oEvyPa8a-TQhTaim?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
